title: bolbitis sumatrana
intro: Bolbitis sumatrana is a species of fern in the family Lomariopsidaceae, native to Southeast Asia and found in tropical forests. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Bolbitis sumatrana include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Bolbitis sumatrana is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves are also used to make herbal remedies, such as teas and tinctures, for various health conditions.
